blocker: Tokens are not logged in the result JSONs, so USD cost is modelled (call-shape + price table) rather than measured; the measurement upgrade requires editing a shared core file (rex/eval_pass_at_k.py) which the no-shared-edit rule forbids, so it is documented as a follow-up.
one_line: Built a token/cost model (real Claude prices + assumed gateway-slug prices + per-condition call shape from rex code) and a script that computes pass@1-per-dollar from the real A1/A2 pass@1 JSONs; ran it, emitting a 10-row cost-efficiency table showing rex buys 0.90 pass@1 vs best_of_n's 0.34 at equal 4-call cost.
